description: Identify and interview (or proxy via published material) the buyers in script breakdown, VFX bidding, and department-data workflows. Validate that Fabula's narrative graph addresses a budget line they actually own. Reference Netflix's 2024 AI Breakdown Assistant talk as competitive signal. Output: a one-pager on who buys, what they pay for today, and how Fabula slots in. we’ll make this the deliverable for first email contact from the fabula.productions website.
title: Pre-production audience research (script breakdown / VFX bidding)
